scope: R49-R56 DRAM RAS series/termination resistor bank
coordinate_system: component-side board millimetres; centres are local photo fits rounded to 0.1 mm
promotion_rule: the .006 assembly drawing fixes refdes order and the target .009 owner photographs independently prove the unchanged eight-body vertical construction, lead span, population, and readable case values; connectivity remains owned by the traced sheet-2 nets

sources.role: refdes order: R56/R52, R55/R51, R54/R50, R53/R49 from top to bottom
target-board component view of the complete alternating 5K1/75-ohm column
independent overlap exposing the upper R56/R52 pair
reflected-side corroboration of the drilled vertical bank

footprint.basis: clear R50 and R53 lead-joint pairs measure approximately 11.1 mm and 10.7 mm through the local panorama fit; the 10.16 mm period footprint is the matching standard span within registration uncertainty

disposition: placement, population, orientation, lead span, and values closed; electrical endpoints remain the already traced D53/RAS/GND nets
